question: In the given image, where is the chair made out of tree trunks and stumps located? Select from the following options: (A) On the left side of the image. (B) Close to the right side of the image. (C) In the center of the image. (D) Behind the tree in the image.
gold_answer: On the left side of the image
answer_choices: On the left side of the image
Close to the right side of the image
In the center of the image
Behind the tree in the image

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: a tree stump chair positioned on the right side of the image
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: a tree stump chair on the left side of the image

inpaint_prompt_used: a tree stump chair positioned on the right side of the image
negative_prompt_used: a tree stump chair on the left side of the image
